content: Certification policies (learn.microsoft.com/legal/marketplace/certification-policies): 1100 Microsoft 365 general (clear value prop/FRE, no unexpected doc changes, consent for personal info, HTTPS required, sign-in/out UX, correctly sized icon); 1120 Office Add-ins (latest office.js + manifest schema, valid support URL, high-res icon mandatory, version must increment each update, SSO needs fallback + cert notes); 1120.2 mobile-specific (no in-app purchase UI on iOS/Android); 1120.5 Excel custom functions need helpUrl + cert test notes. Broad 100.x policies: no inappropriate content, security (HTTPS, no undisclosed exe launch), functionality must match listing, personal info policy link required.
